# Nano Banana Prompt Guide — Banana Clean

> Curated PDF collection of 50+ battle-tested prompts for AI image generation with Nano Banana and Gemini. 12 style categories, composition tips, parameter cheat sheets. Free bonus tool included. From $2.99/month.

## Pages

- [Home](https://banana-clean.app/): Nano Banana Prompt Guide — curated prompts for AI image generation
- [Pricing](https://banana-clean.app/pricing): Full guide access — $2.99/mo or $24.99/yr, cancel anytime
- [Privacy Policy](https://banana-clean.app/privacy): What data is collected, how the guide and bonus tool work
- [Blog](https://banana-clean.app/blog): Guides on AI image generation, prompt engineering, and creative workflows
